feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP, ABAP environment
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP, ABAP environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Configure Solution manager 7.2 connectivity with Service Now for Alerts
entry.content:
Hi,

I am looking how to configure the connectivity between Solution Manager and Service Now so that Solution manager Monitoring alerts from the alert inbox will be connected Service now / so that alert will also be generated in Service now

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Configure Solution manager 7.2 connectivity with Serv...
entry.content:
If you want to integrate a 3rd Party Tool (e.g. Service Now)  for your alerts in System Monitoring, this is described under the section" Send SNMP trap to third party tool"
https://support.sap.com/en/alm/solution-manager/expert-portal/alert-consumer-badi-interface.html
A standard implementation of this functionality is available with SAP Solution Manager in the document HOW-TO GUIDE-SNMP-Trap-Adapter.pdf

And in KBA 2469194  Understanding Alert Consumer BAdI Interface - SAP Solution Manager 7.2

entry.title: Re: VA01 - billing plain - modify text
entry.content:
HI,
I write a message in the text position of order SD with VA02 trx.

The text is inherited in the invoice item text with the determination text.

If I modify the TEXT in sd order position with va02 trx, the text in the previosly created invoice is automatically modified.

Is it possible to block the change of text on previous invoice?

 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Public cloud interface development
entry.content:
Dear Ivan-san,

Thank you very much for your prompt reply and detailed explanations. Your insights have provided me with a clear understanding of our service limitations.

It's evident to me that we are constrained in terms of what we can offer, except in the "side by side" development fields, in response to customer requirements within the "Public Cloud".

Currently, We have only S4H Public Cloud license seller alliance with SAP Japan. As our Q&A with you, I now fully grasp that delivering S4H Public Cloud solutions necessitates a distinct sales approach compared to other SAP products, such as Private cloud and On-premise solutions.

Your guidance has been invaluable in clarifying our strategy moving forward.
I look forward to further collaboration and refinement in our approach to serving our clients.

Warm regards,
Takashi

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Code Joule 403 in Trial Account
entry.content: @MichaelRAs I see your prompt message is too long and unable to read in generic statement. could you repharse and try it.

entry.title: Actual Cost Component Split always active?
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Is the actual cost component split automatically activated for all valuation areas if scope item 33Q Actual Costing is activated in the backend (IMG Activity Activate Actual Cost Component Split)?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Actual Cost Component Split always active?
How to monitor SAP MaxDB in Solution Manager 7.2?
entry.content:
how to monitor SAP MaxDB in solution manager? Are there any guides for it? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to monitor SAP MaxDB in Solution Manager 7.2?
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

It seems that there is no specific guide for MaxDB. Please see the following general steps and useful notes:

  1. Install the DAA Agent and SAP Host Agent on the Max DB servers.
    1858920-Diagnostics Agent installation with SWPM
    2253383-Diagnostics Agent - SWPM Archive-Based Installation
    1031096 - Installing Package SAPHOSTAGENT 

  2. Connect the DAA Agent to SAP Solution Manager. 
    2385361 - How to connect Diagnostics Agent to SAP Solution Manager 7.2 system

  3. Ensure that the Outside Discovery DAA Agent process is running correctly locally on the host. 
    1992342 - How to troubleshoot the Outside Discovery issues about Database 

    Or it is also suggested to switch to the Outside Discovery SAP Host Agent to avoid known issues.
    2556432 - Switch Outside Discovery from Diagnostics Agent to SAP Host Agent
    https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/sl/3362916651.html?locale=en-US

  4. Complete the MaxDB managed system configuration in transaction SOLMAN_SETUP.

  5. Set up technical monitoring, including alerting.

The steps for monitoring databases are similar in SAP Solution Manager. Please use the following DB6 link as a reference. 
https://help.sap.com/docs/DB6/a212028be9ad489cbb8b6145effca9f7/f9b4906aa18642d387d5986b1932e63a.html

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: How to make futur termination date visible before termination date ?
entry.content:
We are storing End Date for Fixed Term Contract employees in a custom date field.

we have a requirement to also store for unfixed term contract employee, the termination date when these one is being entered and make it visible 31 days before the effective date.

2 cases can happen:

case 1 : employee futur termination < = 31

between termination date data entry and termination date the custom date is filled with termination date

case 2 : employee futur termination > 31

between termination date data entry and termination date -32

no date is visible in custom date field

between termination date-31 and termination date

custom date is filled with termination date.

i’m not sure what trigger field i should use in a business rule.

i was thinking to use post save trigger and create a new event post the actual event date ( and prior the futur termination event) but these would requires to also handle the case when termination event is being removed ( these case would also need a post save rule to delete the event with termination date before itself)

am i going in the right direction or is there a simpler way to do so ?

i m thinking also to use offcycle event batch.

entry.title: Re: Customizing search help Max No. of hits
entry.content:
I found the setting: callcontrol-no_maxdisp = ''.

Just clear this field.

Regards,
Eric

entry.title: The input tax calculation after the parking documents is selected calculate tax
entry.content:
Hi All,

According to SAP Notes 3086773, I know when the parking documents is selected calculate tax, Input tax items will not be stored in the related tables. But there is already a tax calculation on the tax tab, I want to know the calculation logic here.

Please help! Thanks All !

entry.title: Do you have a qualitative Hiring report ?
entry.content:
We are trying to extract from successfactors some quality kpi on how a hiring is being done.

these includes the number of time a hiring event is updated.

so far, the only 2 usable fields in jobinfo that can be useful are:

- last modified date

- last modified by

we have not find any builtin report where the number of update per hire is being captured.

since these data is collected in audit report , these data is customer specific while it would be good practice to compare with local practice ( to see if a customer is above average practice in his country) 

to see if there is room for improvement

entry.title: Re: Do you have a qualitative Hiring report ?
entry.content: There's re standard /delivered reports in SuccessFactors reporting, whether you use canvas or story

entry.title: Re: Account member formula isn't working
entry.content: Hello, thank you for the reply! Although this method still didn't help my function work for me. I specified the ID and it still didn't get the specified values I was looking for.

entry.title: Sourcing Project Template in Guided sourcing
entry.content:
Hi All,

When creating guided souring template for RFP, some of the timing rules like below are editable only if i choose bidding rule "Must participant improve their bids" to Yes. But in Classic sourcing template, below timing rules are editable irrespective of the value defined for bidding rule "Must participant improve their bids" as either "yes" or "No"
1.Set a review period after lot or item closes.

2.Allow bidding overtime.

3.Estimated Award Date.

4.Specify how lot bidding will begin and end.

I would like to know that this is standard behavior and reason for this. Any document reference will be helpful.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Asset Register
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Can anyone please help me with how to remove asset from Fixed Asset Register in S4 hana. In my company there is a requirement that there are multiple assets which have been scrapped so need to retire/remove them from FAR. Can anyone please tell me how I can do that and if its possible then can we remove multiple assets at one time.

entry.title: Had http 404 error on IBP supply chain topics for last week. It was working 2 weeks back.
entry.content: Had http 404 error on IBP supply chain topics for last week. It was working 2 weeks back. @supply chain

Were you able to find a solution to this. We have same requirement and trying to change product description in GTS. Thanks!

entry.title: GST India: Inventorization for STO
